entity.summary: Buenos Aires-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2014 for Latin American markets. Huobi Global, now HTX, acquired Bitex on May 26, 2022 and announced that its exchange operations would be integrated with Huobi's platform.
entity.notes: HEI treats the 2022-05-26 Huobi acquisition as the terminal marker for Bitex as an independent exchange identity. Acquisition materials said the Bitex brand and management would continue during integration, so this is modeled as acquired rather than a same-day shutdown. Bitex API documentation remains reachable, but current independent trading operation was not verified; official_url_status is therefore live_unverified.

events.title: Bitex.la launched in Buenos Aires
events.description: Bitex.la officially launched a real-time bitcoin and litecoin exchange based in Buenos Aires for the Latin American market.
events.notes: The date follows contemporaneous launch coverage published on May 30, 2014.

events.title: Huobi Global acquired Bitex
events.description: Huobi Global acquired Bitex as part of its Latin American expansion and announced plans to integrate Bitex's exchange operations with the Huobi platform.
events.notes: Used as the terminal marker for Bitex as an independent exchange identity. The acquisition announcement did not describe an immediate brand shutdown.

evidence.title: Latin American Bitcoin Exchange Bitex.la Launches with $2 Million Investment
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report documents the official launch, Buenos Aires base, and regional exchange scope.

evidence.title: New Bitcoin/Litecoin Exchange Bitex.la Launched in Buenos Aires
evidence.notes: Independent contemporaneous coverage corroborates the launch and Argentina origin.

evidence.title: Huobi Global Steps Up Latin America Presence with Bitex Acquisition
evidence.notes: Syndicated company announcement records the acquisition and planned integration of Bitex exchange operations with Huobi Global.

evidence.title: Huobi Global Acquires Latin American Crypto Exchange Bitex
evidence.notes: Independent reporting corroborates the acquisition and Bitex's Latin American operating scope.

evidence.title: Bitex Whitelabeler API
evidence.notes: Reachable first-party documentation preserves the historical exchange.bitex.la platform and API identity, but does not by itself establish current independent trading operation.
